name: Lattice-Topped Turkey Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine the first eight ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
3. Spoon the mixture into a greased 12"x8"x2-inch baking dish.
4. Separate the crescent dough rectangles, press the perforations to seal them, and cut into four long strips and four short strips.
5. Arrange the strips in a lattice design over the casserole.
6. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
7. Bake for 35 minutes. Garnish with radish slices and fresh parsley sprigs, if desired.
